## Character or reference

Describe the pet idea, mascot, meme, or character style.

## Reference links or images

Add links or attach images if you have them.

## Motion notes

What should the pet do when idle, waiting, running, failing, or reviewing?

## Usage

Is this for personal use, a public project, a team mascot, or a commercial brand?

## Budget and deadline

Optional, but useful if this is a commissioned request.
